concerns.detail: Discloses full name of student ('ding yufei') and personal relationship status (referred to as 'ghr's npy')
Vulgar gendered slurs and insults (婊, 贱, bitch) constituting pure personal attack without substantive critique of advising practices

Large deletion of substantive observations about SJTU Yong-lu Li (undergraduate mentoring, AI paper editing, PUA allegations) replaced with empty lines, indicating suppression of legitimate critique rather than cleanup
